title: Dominic dreams — sadistic doctor + court loop, Nov 2024
html:
TL;DR

  • Two weeks after 2024 10 31 dominic, Yahir transcribes the specific nightmare/delusion structure Dominic has been describing.
  • Plot: Dominic goes to rehab → doctor tortures him → he gets out → tells loved ones → they believe him → tell him to bring it to court → he fucks up and goes to court high → put back in rehab → doctor continues "unfathomable mental torture" → released → and the note cuts off mid-sentence at "n".
  • Reads as Yahir trying to preserve the internal logic of Dominic's persecution-loop in case it's ever useful for understanding what's happening.

Key beat

"Goes to rehab, doctor tortured him, gets out tells his loved ones. They believe him and tell him to bring him to court, but he says he fucks up and goes to court high."

Why it matters in the graph

  • The doctor-torture motif is now twice-confirmed in two different notes (2024 10 31 dominic + this one) — meaning it's the stable narrative of Dominic's psychic state, not a passing detail.
  • Yahir is functioning as family chronicler / external memory for Dominic's experience — a role he explicitly takes on across 2025 06 21 on bubbas too.
  • The court-while-high → re-rehab loop suggests Dominic perceives systemic persecution mediated by his own self-sabotage at decision points — a tragic-narrative shape worth preserving for any future intervention discussion.
  • Adds another data point to Yahir's dream-as-letter-to-self corpus, this time dreaming-by-proxy — recording someone else's dreams.

Open questions

  • Did the note get truncated by accident, or was Yahir interrupted? The "n" ending is suspicious.
  • Has any actual court date happened, or is this purely Dominic's narrative?

Wikilinks
